# mihari_monitor (Data Source)

Reads a single Mihari monitor by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mihari_monitor" "example" {
  id = "existing-monitor-uuid"
}

output "monitor_name" {
  value = data.mihari_monitor.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the monitor.

### Read-Only

- `check_interval` (Number)
- `check_ssl` (Boolean)
- `created_at` (String)
- `expected_status_code` (Number)
- `host` (String)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `keyword` (String)
- `last_checked_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `policy_id` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `timeout` (Number)
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String)
